CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW public.view_politician_behavioral_trends AS WITH monthly_voting_data AS (
    SELECT embedded_id_intressent_id AS person_id,
        date_trunc('month', embedded_id_vote_date::timestamp with time zone) AS period_start,
        max(first_name) AS first_name,
        max(last_name) AS last_name,
        max(party) AS party,
        sum(number_ballots) AS total_ballots,
        sum(total_votes) AS total_votes,
        round(avg(avg_percentage_absent), 2) AS avg_absence_rate,
        round(avg(avg_percentage_yes), 2) AS avg_yes_rate,
        round(avg(avg_percentage_no), 2) AS avg_no_rate,
        round(avg(avg_percentage_abstain), 2) AS avg_abstain_rate,
        round(avg(won_percentage), 2) AS avg_win_rate,
        round(avg(rebel_percentage), 2) AS avg_rebel_rate
    FROM view_riksdagen_vote_data_ballot_politician_summary_daily
    WHERE embedded_id_vote_date >= (CURRENT_DATE - interval '3 years')
    GROUP BY embedded_id_intressent_id, date_trunc('month', embedded_id_vote_date::timestamp with time zone)
), violation_counts AS (
    SELECT reference_id AS person_id,
        date_trunc('month', detected_date) AS period_start,
        count(*) AS violation_count,
        count(DISTINCT rule_group) AS violation_types,
        max(detected_date) AS latest_violation_date
    FROM rule_violation
    WHERE resource_type = 'POLITICIAN'
      AND status IN ('MINOR','MAJOR','CRITICAL')
      AND detected_date >= (CURRENT_DATE - interval '3 years')
    GROUP BY reference_id, date_trunc('month', detected_date)
), trend_calculations AS (
    SELECT mvd.person_id,
        mvd.period_start,
        mvd.first_name,
        mvd.last_name,
        mvd.party,
        mvd.total_ballots,
        mvd.total_votes,
        mvd.avg_absence_rate,
        mvd.avg_yes_rate,
        mvd.avg_no_rate,
        mvd.avg_abstain_rate,
        mvd.avg_win_rate,
        mvd.avg_rebel_rate,
        COALESCE(vc.violation_count, 0::bigint) AS violation_count,
        COALESCE(vc.violation_types, 0::bigint) AS violation_types,
        lag(mvd.avg_absence_rate, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY mvd.person_id ORDER BY mvd.period_start) AS prev_absence_rate,
        lag(mvd.avg_win_rate, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY mvd.person_id ORDER BY mvd.period_start) AS prev_win_rate,
        lag(mvd.avg_rebel_rate, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY mvd.person_id ORDER BY mvd.period_start) AS prev_rebel_rate,
        round(avg(mvd.avg_absence_rate) OVER (PARTITION BY mvd.person_id ORDER BY mvd.period_start ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW), 2) AS ma_3month_absence,
        round(avg(mvd.avg_win_rate) OVER (PARTITION BY mvd.person_id ORDER BY mvd.period_start ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW), 2) AS ma_3month_win_rate,
        round(avg(mvd.avg_rebel_rate) OVER (PARTITION BY mvd.person_id ORDER BY mvd.period_start ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW), 2) AS ma_3month_rebel_rate
    FROM monthly_voting_data mvd
      LEFT JOIN violation_counts vc ON mvd.person_id::text = vc.person_id::text AND mvd.period_start = vc.period_start
)
SELECT person_id,
    period_start,
    (period_start + interval '1 month' - interval '1 day')::date AS period_end,
    first_name,
    last_name,
    party,
    total_ballots,
    total_votes,
    avg_absence_rate,
    avg_yes_rate,
    avg_no_rate,
    avg_abstain_rate,
    avg_win_rate,
    avg_rebel_rate,
    violation_count,
    violation_types,
    round(avg_absence_rate - prev_absence_rate, 2) AS absence_trend,
    round(avg_win_rate - prev_win_rate, 2) AS win_rate_trend,
    round(avg_rebel_rate - prev_rebel_rate, 2) AS rebel_rate_trend,
    ma_3month_absence,
    ma_3month_win_rate,
    ma_3month_rebel_rate,
    CASE
        WHEN avg_absence_rate >= 30::numeric THEN 'HIGH_ABSENTEEISM'
        WHEN avg_absence_rate >= 15::numeric THEN 'MODERATE_ABSENTEEISM'
        WHEN avg_absence_rate >= 5::numeric THEN 'LOW_ABSENTEEISM'
        ELSE 'EXCELLENT_ATTENDANCE'
    END AS attendance_status,
    CASE
        WHEN avg_win_rate >= 80::numeric THEN 'HIGHLY_EFFECTIVE'
        WHEN avg_win_rate >= 60::numeric THEN 'EFFECTIVE'
        WHEN avg_win_rate >= 40::numeric THEN 'MODERATELY_EFFECTIVE'
        ELSE 'LOW_EFFECTIVENESS'
    END AS effectiveness_status,
    CASE
        WHEN avg_rebel_rate >= 20::numeric THEN 'HIGH_INDEPENDENCE'
        WHEN avg_rebel_rate >= 10::numeric THEN 'MODERATE_INDEPENDENCE'
        WHEN avg_rebel_rate >= 5::numeric THEN 'LOW_INDEPENDENCE'
        ELSE 'PARTY_LOYAL'
    END AS discipline_status,
    CASE
        WHEN avg_absence_rate >= 30::numeric OR avg_rebel_rate >= 20::numeric OR violation_count >= 3 THEN 'ELEVATED_RISK'
        WHEN avg_absence_rate >= 15::numeric OR avg_rebel_rate >= 10::numeric OR violation_count >= 1 THEN 'MODERATE_RISK'
        WHEN avg_win_rate >= 70::numeric AND avg_absence_rate < 10::numeric THEN 'HIGH_PERFORMER'
        ELSE 'STANDARD_BEHAVIOR'
    END AS behavioral_assessment
FROM trend_calculations
WHERE total_ballots >= 5::numeric
ORDER BY person_id, period_start DESC

WITH categorical_columns AS (
    SELECT 
        c.table_name,
        c.column_name,
        c.data_type,
        c.character_maximum_length
    FROM information_schema.columns c
    JOIN information_schema.tables t 
        ON t.table_schema = c.table_schema 
        AND t.table_name = c.table_name
    WHERE c.table_schema = $1
      AND t.table_type = $2
      AND c.data_type IN ($3 /*, ... */)
      -- Exclude large text fields and known non-categorical columns
      AND (c.character_maximum_length IS NULL OR c.character_maximum_length <= $4)
      -- ========================================================================
      -- EXCLUDE CONTENT/TEXT FIELDS (long text, descriptions, etc.)
      -- ========================================================================
      AND c.column_name NOT IN ($5 /*, ... */)
      -- ========================================================================
      -- EXCLUDE URL FIELDS
      -- ========================================================================
      AND c.column_name NOT IN ($6 /*, ... */)
      -- ========================================================================
      -- EXCLUDE NAME FIELDS (person names, full names, etc.)
      -- ========================================================================
      AND c.column_name NOT IN ($7 /*, ... */)
      -- ========================================================================
      -- EXCLUDE ID FIELDS (unique identifiers, foreign keys, etc.)
      -- ========================================================================
      AND c.column_name NOT LIKE $8
      AND c.column_name NOT LIKE $9
      AND c.column_name NOT LIKE $10
      AND c.column_name != $11
      AND c.column_name NOT LIKE $12
      AND c.column_name NOT LIKE $13
      AND c.column_name NOT LIKE $14
      AND c.column_name NOT LIKE $15
      AND c.column_name NOT LIKE $16
      AND c.column_name NOT LIKE $17
      AND c.column_name NOT LIKE $18
      -- ========================================================================
      -- EXCLUDE SESSION/USER TRACKING FIELDS
      -- ========================================================================
      AND c.column_name NOT IN ($19 /*, ... */)
      -- ========================================================================
      -- EXCLUDE DATE/TIME STRING FIELDS
      -- ========================================================================
      AND c.column_name NOT LIKE $20
      AND c.column_name NOT LIKE $21
      AND c.column_name NOT IN ($22 /*, ... */)
      -- ========================================================================
      -- EXCLUDE TECHNICAL/INFRASTRUCTURE TABLES (not domain data)
      -- ========================================================================
      -- Javers audit tables (jv_*)
      AND c.table_name NOT LIKE $23
      -- Quartz scheduler tables (qrtz_*)
      AND c.table_name NOT LIKE $24
      -- Liquibase migration tables
      AND c.table_name NOT IN ($25 /*, ... */)
      -- Hibernate sequence table
      AND c.table_name != $26
      -- Encrypted value storage (sensitive)
      AND c.table_name != $27
      -- Application session/event tables (user tracking, not political data)
      AND c.table_name NOT IN ($28 /*, ... */)
      -- User account tables (sensitive)
      AND c.table_name NOT IN ($29 /*, ... */)
      -- Portal configuration tables
      AND c.table_name NOT IN ($30 /*, ... */)
      -- Rule violation tracking
      AND c.table_name != $31
      -- Data source metadata
      AND c.table_name != $32
      -- Language/translation tables (not political data)
      AND c.table_name NOT IN ($33 /*, ... */)
      -- ========================================================================
      -- EXCLUDE OTHER HIGH-CARDINALITY OR NON-CATEGORICAL COLUMNS
      -- ========================================================================
      AND c.column_name NOT IN ($34 /*, ... */)
      -- ========================================================================
      -- Skip columns already extracted above (critical columns)
      -- ========================================================================
      AND NOT (c.table_name = $35 AND c.column_name IN ($36 /*, ... */))
      AND NOT (c.table_name = $37 AND c.column_name IN ($38 /*, ... */))
      AND NOT (c.table_name = $39 AND c.column_name IN ($40 /*, ... */))
      AND NOT (c.table_name = $41 AND c.column_name IN ($42 /*, ... */))
      AND NOT (c.table_name = $43 AND c.column_name IN ($44 /*, ... */))
      AND NOT (c.table_name = $45 AND c.column_name IN ($46 /*, ... */))
      AND NOT (c.table_name = $47 AND c.column_name IN ($48))
      AND NOT (c.table_name = $49 AND c.column_name IN ($50 /*, ... */))
      AND NOT (c.table_name = $51 AND c.column_name IN ($52 /*, ... */))
    ORDER BY c.table_name, c.column_name
)
SELECT format(
    $53 || $54 ||
    $55 || $56,
    table_name, column_name,
    column_name, table_name, column_name, column_name, column_name,
    table_name, column_name
)
FROM categorical_columns

WITH view_counts AS (
    SELECT schemaname,
           viewname,
           row_count
    FROM cia_view_row_counts
    WHERE viewname != $1
      AND viewname != $2
      AND viewname NOT LIKE $3
      -- Skip views that timed out or had errors during Phase 1
      -- row_count: -1 = timeout, -2 = error, 0+ = success
      AND row_count >= $4
),
-- ============================================================================
-- TEMPORAL VIEW CLASSIFICATION
-- ============================================================================
-- Identify views by temporal granularity based on naming patterns
-- This enables stratified sampling across time periods
-- Uses reusable cia_classify_temporal_view() function
-- ============================================================================
view_temporal_classification AS (
    SELECT 
        vc.schemaname,
        vc.viewname,
        vc.row_count,
        c.temporal_granularity,
        c.samples_per_bucket
    FROM view_counts vc
    CROSS JOIN LATERAL cia_classify_temporal_view(vc.viewname) AS c
    -- CHANGED: Include ALL views, even empty ones (for header-only CSV files)
    -- WHERE vc.row_count > 0  -- REMOVED: No longer skip empty views
),
-- ============================================================================
-- TEMPORAL COLUMN DETECTION
-- ============================================================================
-- Automatically detect temporal columns in each view
-- ============================================================================
view_temporal_columns AS (
    SELECT 
        c.table_schema AS schemaname,
        c.table_name AS viewname,
        c.column_name AS temporal_column,
        c.data_type,
        -- Prioritize common temporal column names
        CASE 
            WHEN c.column_name IN ($5 /*, ... */) THEN $6
            WHEN c.column_name IN ($7 /*, ... */) THEN $8
            WHEN c.column_name IN ($9 /*, ... */) THEN $10
            WHEN c.column_name LIKE $11 THEN $12
            ELSE $13
        END AS priority
    FROM information_schema.columns c
    WHERE c.table_schema = $14
      AND c.data_type IN ($15 /*, ... */)
      AND c.column_name NOT IN ($16 /*, ... */) -- Exclude technical columns
),
view_primary_temporal_column AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (schemaname, viewname)
        schemaname,
        viewname,
        temporal_column
    FROM view_temporal_columns
    ORDER BY schemaname, viewname, priority
),
-- ============================================================================
-- GENERATE STRATIFIED SAMPLING QUERIES
-- ============================================================================
view_extract AS (
    SELECT 
        vtc.schemaname,
        vtc.viewname,
        vtc.row_count,
        vtc.temporal_granularity,
        vtc.samples_per_bucket,
        vptc.temporal_column,
        -- Smart sample size calculation:
        -- 1. Complete extraction for small views (< threshold)
        -- 2. Extended samples for analytical trend views (election proximity, seasonal activity, career trajectory)
        -- 3. Extended samples for party/committee/person views
        -- 4. Extended samples for document/voting/worldbank views
        -- 5. Default sample size for others
        CASE 
            -- Complete extraction for small views
            WHEN vtc.row_count <= $17::int THEN vtc.row_count
            -- Extended samples for analytical trend views (500 rows for better temporal coverage)
            WHEN vtc.viewname IN ($18 /*, ... */) THEN
                LEAST($19::int, vtc.row_count)
            -- Extended samples for party-related views
            WHEN vtc.viewname ILIKE $20 OR vtc.viewname ILIKE $21 THEN 
                LEAST($22::int, vtc.row_count)
            -- Extended samples for committee-related views
            WHEN vtc.viewname ILIKE $23 OR vtc.viewname ILIKE $24 THEN 
                LEAST($25::int, vtc.row_count)
            -- Extended samples for person/politician views
            WHEN vtc.viewname ILIKE $26 OR vtc.viewname ILIKE $27 
                OR vtc.viewname ILIKE $28 THEN 
                LEAST($29::int, vtc.row_count)
            -- Extended samples for document-related views
            WHEN vtc.viewname ILIKE $30 OR vtc.viewname ILIKE $31 THEN 
                LEAST($32::int, vtc.row_count)
            -- Extended samples for voting-related views
            WHEN vtc.viewname ILIKE $33 OR vtc.viewname ILIKE $34 THEN 
                LEAST($35::int, vtc.row_count)
            -- Extended samples for worldbank data
            WHEN vtc.viewname ILIKE $36 OR vtc.viewname ILIKE $37 
                OR vtc.viewname ILIKE $38 THEN 
                LEAST($39::int, vtc.row_count)
            -- Default sample size
            ELSE LEAST($40::int, vtc.row_count)
        END AS sample_rows,
        -- Extraction type for logging
        CASE 
            WHEN vtc.row_count <= $41::int THEN $42
            WHEN vtc.viewname IN ($43 /*, ... */) THEN $44
            WHEN vtc.viewname ILIKE $45 OR vtc.viewname ILIKE $46 THEN $47
            WHEN vtc.viewname ILIKE $48 OR vtc.viewname ILIKE $49 THEN $50
            WHEN vtc.viewname ILIKE $51 OR vtc.viewname ILIKE $52 
                OR vtc.viewname ILIKE $53 THEN $54
            WHEN vtc.viewname ILIKE $55 OR vtc.viewname ILIKE $56 THEN $57
            WHEN vtc.viewname ILIKE $58 OR vtc.viewname ILIKE $59 THEN $60
            WHEN vtc.viewname ILIKE $61 OR vtc.viewname ILIKE $62 
                OR vtc.viewname ILIKE $63 THEN $64
            ELSE $65
        END AS extraction_type,
        CASE WHEN vtc.viewname LIKE $66 THEN vtc.viewname ELSE $67 || vtc.viewname END AS file_prefix
    FROM view_temporal_classification vtc
    LEFT JOIN view_primary_temporal_column vptc 
        ON vtc.schemaname = vptc.schemaname 
        AND vtc.viewname = vptc.viewname
)
-- ============================================================================
-- GENERATE EXTRACTION COMMANDS WITH TEMPORAL STRATIFICATION
-- ============================================================================
SELECT 
    CASE 
        -- =====================================================================
        -- DAILY VIEWS: Stratified sampling by day
        -- =====================================================================
        WHEN temporal_granularity = $68 AND temporal_column IS NOT NULL THEN
            format(
                $69 || $70 ||
                $71 ||
                $72 ||
                $73 ||
                $74 ||
                $75 ||
                $76 ||
                $77 ||
                $78 ||
                $79 || $80 ||
                $81 || $82 || $83 || $84 ||
                CASE 
                    WHEN row_count = $85 THEN $86 || $87
                    ELSE $88 || $89
                END,
                viewname,
                samples_per_bucket,
                temporal_column, schemaname, viewname, temporal_column,
                samples_per_bucket, sample_rows,
                file_prefix,
                viewname, row_count, row_count,
                file_prefix, file_prefix
            )
        
        -- =====================================================================
        -- WEEKLY VIEWS: Stratified sampling by week
        -- =====================================================================
        WHEN temporal_granularity = $90 AND temporal_column IS NOT NULL THEN
            format(
                $91 || $92 ||
                $93 ||
                $94 ||
                $95 ||
                $96 ||
                $97 ||
                $98 ||
                $99 ||
                $100 ||
                $101 || $102 ||
                $103 || $104 || $105 || $106 ||
                CASE 
                    WHEN row_count = $107 THEN $108 || $109
                    ELSE $110 || $111
                END,
                viewname,
                samples_per_bucket,
                temporal_column, schemaname, viewname, temporal_column,
                samples_per_bucket, sample_rows,
                file_prefix,
                viewname, row_count, row_count,
                file_prefix, file_prefix
            )
        
        -- =====================================================================
        -- MONTHLY VIEWS: Stratified sampling by month
        -- =====================================================================
        WHEN temporal_granularity = $112 AND temporal_column IS NOT NULL THEN
            format(
                $113 || $114 ||
                $115 ||
                $116 ||
                $117 ||
                $118 ||
                $119 ||
                $120 ||
                $121 ||
                $122 ||
                $123 || $124 ||
                $125 || $126 || $127 || $128 ||
                CASE 
                    WHEN row_count = $129 THEN $130 || $131
                    ELSE $132 || $133
                END,
                viewname,
                samples_per_bucket,
                temporal_column, schemaname, viewname, temporal_column,
                samples_per_bucket, sample_rows,
                file_prefix,
                viewname, row_count, row_count,
                file_prefix, file_prefix
            )
        
        -- =====================================================================
        -- ANNUAL VIEWS: Stratified sampling by year
        -- =====================================================================
        WHEN temporal_granularity = $134 AND temporal_column IS NOT NULL THEN
            format(
                $135 || $136 ||
                $137 ||
                $138 ||
                $139 ||
                $140 ||
                $141 ||
                $142 ||
                $143 ||
                $144 || $145 ||
                $146 || $147 || $148 || $149 ||
                CASE 
                    WHEN row_count = $150 THEN $151 || $152
                    ELSE $153 || $154
                END,
                viewname,
                samples_per_bucket,
                temporal_column, schemaname, viewname,
                samples_per_bucket, sample_rows,
                file_prefix,
                viewname, row_count, row_count,
                file_prefix, file_prefix
            )
        
        -- =====================================================================
        -- TEMPORAL TREND VIEWS: Sample across all time periods
        -- =====================================================================
        WHEN temporal_granularity = $155 AND temporal_column IS NOT NULL THEN
            format(
                $156 || $157 ||
                $158 ||
                $159 ||
                $160 ||
                $161 ||
                $162 ||
                $163 ||
                $164 ||
                $165 ||
                $166 || $167 ||
                $168 || $169 || $170 || $171 ||
                CASE 
                    WHEN row_count = $172 THEN $173 || $174
                    ELSE $175 || $176
                END,
                viewname,
                temporal_column, temporal_column, schemaname, viewname,
                sample_rows,
                file_prefix,
                viewname, row_count, row_count,
                file_prefix, file_prefix
            )
        
        -- =====================================================================
        -- NON-TEMPORAL VIEWS: Use random sampling with smart sample sizes
        -- =====================================================================
        ELSE
            format(
                $177 || $178 ||
                $179 || $180 ||
                $181 || $182 || $183 || $184 ||
                CASE 
                    WHEN row_count = $185 THEN $186 || $187
                    ELSE $188 || $189
                END,
                extraction_type,
                viewname,
                sample_rows,
                row_count,
                schemaname,
                viewname,
                sample_rows,
                file_prefix,
                viewname, row_count, row_count,
                file_prefix,
                file_prefix
            )
    END AS extraction_command
FROM view_extract
ORDER BY 
    CASE temporal_granularity
        WHEN $190 THEN $191
        WHEN $192 THEN $193
        WHEN $194 THEN $195
        WHEN $196 THEN $197
        WHEN $198 THEN $199
        ELSE $200
    END,
    viewname

SELECT c.relname, ns.nspname FROM pg_catalog.pg_class c
 JOIN pg_catalog.pg_namespace ns ON c.relnamespace OPERATOR(pg_catalog.=) ns.oid
 CROSS JOIN LATERAL (SELECT c.relkind IN ($1 /*, ... */)) as p (inherited)
 LEFT JOIN pg_catalog.pg_class t ON c.reltoastrelid OPERATOR(pg_catalog.=) t.oid
 WHERE c.relpersistence OPERATOR(pg_catalog.!=) $2
 AND c.relkind OPERATOR(pg_catalog.=) ANY (array[$3 /*, ... */])
 AND (
 EXISTS (SELECT $4 FROM pg_catalog.pg_attribute a
 WHERE a.attrelid OPERATOR(pg_catalog.=) c.oid
 AND a.attnum OPERATOR(pg_catalog.>) $5::pg_catalog.int2
 AND NOT a.attisdropped
 AND a.attstattarget IS DISTINCT FROM $6::pg_catalog.int2
 AND a.attgenerated OPERATOR(pg_catalog.<>) $7
 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT $8 FROM pg_catalog.pg_statistic s
 WHERE s.starelid OPERATOR(pg_catalog.=) a.attrelid
 AND s.staattnum OPERATOR(pg_catalog.=) a.attnum
 AND s.stainherit OPERATOR(pg_catalog.=) p.inherited))
 OR EXISTS (SELECT $9 FROM pg_catalog.pg_statistic_ext e
 WHERE e.stxrelid OPERATOR(pg_catalog.=) c.oid
 AND e.stxstattarget IS DISTINCT FROM $10::pg_catalog.int2
 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT $11 FROM pg_catalog.pg_statistic_ext_data d
 WHERE d.stxoid OPERATOR(pg_catalog.=) e.oid
 AND d.stxdinherit OPERATOR(pg_catalog.=) p.inherited))
 OR EXISTS (SELECT $12 FROM pg_catalog.pg_attribute a
 JOIN pg_catalog.pg_index i ON i.indexrelid OPERATOR(pg_catalog.=) a.attrelid
 WHERE i.indrelid OPERATOR(pg_catalog.=) c.oid
 AND i.indkey[a.attnum OPERATOR(pg_catalog.-) $13::pg_catalog.int2] OPERATOR(pg_catalog.=) $14::pg_catalog.int2
 AND a.attnum OPERATOR(pg_catalog.>) $15::pg_catalog.int2
 AND NOT a.attisdropped
 AND a.attstattarget IS DISTINCT FROM $16::pg_catalog.int2
 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT $17 FROM pg_catalog.pg_statistic s
 WHERE s.starelid OPERATOR(pg_catalog.=) a.attrelid
 AND s.staattnum OPERATOR(pg_catalog.=) a.attnum
 AND s.stainherit OPERATOR(pg_catalog.=) p.inherited))
 OR EXISTS (SELECT $18 FROM pg_catalog.pg_attribute a
 WHERE a.attrelid OPERATOR(pg_catalog.=) c.oid
 AND a.attnum OPERATOR(pg_catalog.>) $19::pg_catalog.int2
 AND NOT a.attisdropped
 AND a.attstattarget IS DISTINCT FROM $20::pg_catalog.int2
 AND a.attgenerated OPERATOR(pg_catalog.<>) $21
 AND c.relhassubclass
 AND NOT p.inherited
 AND EXISTS (SELECT $22 FROM pg_catalog.pg_inherits h
 WHERE h.inhparent OPERATOR(pg_catalog.=) c.oid)
 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT $23 FROM pg_catalog.pg_statistic s
 WHERE s.starelid OPERATOR(pg_catalog.=) a.attrelid
 AND s.staattnum OPERATOR(pg_catalog.=) a.attnum
 AND s.stainherit))
 OR EXISTS (SELECT $24 FROM pg_catalog.pg_statistic_ext e
 WHERE e.stxrelid OPERATOR(pg_catalog.=) c.oid
 AND e.stxstattarget IS DISTINCT FROM $25::pg_catalog.int2
 AND c.relhassubclass
 AND NOT p.inherited
 AND EXISTS (SELECT $26 FROM pg_catalog.pg_inherits h
 WHERE h.inhparent OPERATOR(pg_catalog.=) c.oid)
 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT $27 FROM pg_catalog.pg_statistic_ext_data d
 WHERE d.stxoid OPERATOR(pg_catalog.=) e.oid
 AND d.stxdinherit))
 )
 ORDER BY c.relpages DESC

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW public.view_election_cycle_comparative_analysis AS WITH election_years AS (
    SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2002, 2006, 2010, 2014, 2018, 2022, 2026]) AS election_year
), annual_metrics AS (
    SELECT vm.year,
        vm.is_election_year,
        vm.total_ballots,
        vm.active_politicians,
        vm.attendance_rate,
        vm.avg_yes_rate,
        vm.avg_no_rate,
        vm.avg_abstain_rate,
        COALESCE(dm.documents_produced, 0::bigint) AS documents_produced,
        COALESCE(dm.motions_filed, 0::bigint) AS motions_filed,
        COALESCE(dm.proposals_filed, 0::bigint) AS proposals_filed
    FROM mv_annual_voting_metrics vm
      LEFT JOIN mv_annual_document_metrics dm ON vm.year = dm.year
), election_baseline AS (
    SELECT
        percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY total_ballots::double precision) FILTER (WHERE is_election_year) AS election_median_ballots,
        avg(total_ballots) FILTER (WHERE is_election_year) AS election_avg_ballots,
        stddev(total_ballots) FILTER (WHERE is_election_year) AS election_stddev_ballots,
        avg(total_ballots) FILTER (WHERE NOT is_election_year) AS midterm_avg_ballots,
        stddev(total_ballots) FILTER (WHERE NOT is_election_year) AS midterm_stddev_ballots,
        percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY documents_produced::double precision) FILTER (WHERE is_election_year) AS election_median_docs,
        avg(documents_produced) FILTER (WHERE is_election_year) AS election_avg_docs,
        stddev(documents_produced) FILTER (WHERE is_election_year) AS election_stddev_docs,
        avg(documents_produced) FILTER (WHERE NOT is_election_year) AS midterm_avg_docs,
        stddev(documents_produced) FILTER (WHERE NOT is_election_year) AS midterm_stddev_docs,
        percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY motions_filed::double precision) FILTER (WHERE is_election_year) AS election_median_motions,
        avg(motions_filed) FILTER (WHERE is_election_year) AS election_avg_motions,
        stddev(motions_filed) FILTER (WHERE is_election_year) AS election_stddev_motions,
        avg(motions_filed) FILTER (WHERE NOT is_election_year) AS midterm_avg_motions,
        avg(attendance_rate) FILTER (WHERE is_election_year) AS election_avg_attendance,
        stddev(attendance_rate) FILTER (WHERE is_election_year) AS election_stddev_attendance,
        avg(attendance_rate) FILTER (WHERE NOT is_election_year) AS midterm_avg_attendance
    FROM annual_metrics
)
SELECT am.year,
    am.is_election_year,
    am.total_ballots,
    am.active_politicians,
    am.attendance_rate,
    am.avg_yes_rate,
    am.avg_no_rate,
    am.avg_abstain_rate,
    am.documents_produced,
    am.motions_filed,
    am.proposals_filed,
    round(eb.election_median_ballots::numeric, 2) AS election_median_ballots,
    round(eb.election_avg_ballots, 2) AS election_avg_ballots,
    round(eb.election_stddev_ballots, 2) AS election_stddev_ballots,
    round(eb.midterm_avg_ballots, 2) AS midterm_avg_ballots,
    round(eb.election_median_docs::numeric, 2) AS election_median_docs,
    round(eb.election_avg_docs, 2) AS election_avg_docs,
    round(eb.midterm_avg_docs, 2) AS midterm_avg_docs,
    round(eb.election_median_motions::numeric, 2) AS election_median_motions,
    round(eb.election_avg_motions, 2) AS election_avg_motions,
    round(eb.midterm_avg_motions, 2) AS midterm_avg_motions,
    round(eb.election_avg_attendance, 2) AS election_avg_attendance,
    round(eb.midterm_avg_attendance, 2) AS midterm_avg_attendance,
    CASE
        WHEN am.is_election_year AND eb.election_stddev_ballots > 0 THEN
            round(((am.total_ballots::numeric - eb.election_avg_ballots) / eb.election_stddev_ballots), 2)
        WHEN NOT am.is_election_year AND eb.midterm_stddev_ballots > 0 THEN
            round(((am.total_ballots::numeric - eb.midterm_avg_ballots) / eb.midterm_stddev_ballots), 2)
        ELSE 0
    END AS ballot_z_score,
    CASE
        WHEN am.is_election_year AND eb.election_stddev_docs > 0 THEN
            round(((am.documents_produced::numeric - eb.election_avg_docs) / eb.election_stddev_docs), 2)
        WHEN NOT am.is_election_year AND eb.midterm_stddev_docs > 0 THEN
            round(((am.documents_produced::numeric - COALESCE(eb.midterm_avg_docs, 0)) / eb.midterm_stddev_docs), 2)
        ELSE 0
    END AS document_z_score,
    CASE
        WHEN am.is_election_year AND eb.election_stddev_motions > 0 THEN
            round(((am.motions_filed::numeric - eb.election_avg_motions) / eb.election_stddev_motions), 2)
        ELSE 0
    END AS motion_z_score,
    CASE
        WHEN am.is_election_year AND eb.election_stddev_attendance > 0 THEN
            round(((am.attendance_rate - eb.election_avg_attendance) / eb.election_stddev_attendance), 2)
        ELSE 0
    END AS attendance_z_score,
    ey.election_year AS nearest_election_year,
    abs(am.year - ey.election_year) AS years_from_election,
    CASE
        WHEN am.year = ey.election_year THEN 'ELECTION_YEAR'
        WHEN am.year = ey.election_year - 1 THEN 'PRE_ELECTION'
        WHEN am.year = ey.election_year + 1 THEN 'POST_ELECTION'
        WHEN am.year = ey.election_year + 2 OR am.year = ey.election_year - 2 THEN 'MID_CYCLE'
        ELSE 'TRANSITION'
    END AS election_proximity,
    rank() OVER (ORDER BY am.total_ballots DESC) AS rank_by_ballots,
    rank() OVER (ORDER BY am.documents_produced DESC) AS rank_by_documents,
    rank() OVER (ORDER BY am.attendance_rate DESC) AS rank_by_attendance
FROM annual_metrics am
  CROSS JOIN election_baseline eb
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT ey_inner.election_year
    FROM election_years ey_inner
    ORDER BY abs(am.year - ey_inner.election_year)
    LIMIT 1
  ) ey ON true

CREATE TEMP TABLE tmp_view_sizes AS
SELECT view_name, row_count,
    CASE 
        WHEN row_count < $1 THEN $2
        WHEN row_count < $3 THEN $4
        WHEN row_count < $5 THEN $6
        WHEN row_count < $7 THEN $8
        WHEN row_count < $9 THEN $10
        ELSE $11
    END AS size_category
FROM (
    -- For materialized views, use pg_class.reltuples (fast, uses cached stats)
    SELECT c.relname AS view_name, c.reltuples::bigint AS row_count
    FROM pg_class c
    JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid = c.relnamespace
    WHERE n.nspname = $12 AND c.relkind = $13
    UNION ALL
    -- For regular views, use reltuples from a LIMIT 0 query estimate or just 0
    -- Regular views don't have stats, so we just report them without counting
    SELECT viewname AS view_name, $14::bigint AS row_count
    FROM pg_views WHERE schemaname = $15
) v
ORDER BY row_count DESC

SELECT 
    temporal_granularity AS "Granularity",
    COUNT(*) AS "View Count",
    CASE temporal_granularity
        WHEN $1 THEN $2
        WHEN $3 THEN $4
        WHEN $5 THEN $6
        WHEN $7 THEN $8
        WHEN $9 THEN $10
        ELSE $11
    END AS "Sampling Strategy"
FROM (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN matviewname IS NOT NULL THEN matviewname
            ELSE viewname
        END AS view_name,
        c.temporal_granularity
    FROM (
        SELECT viewname, $12::text AS matviewname FROM pg_views WHERE schemaname = $13
        UNION ALL
        SELECT $14::text AS viewname, matviewname FROM pg_matviews WHERE schemaname = $15
    ) v
    CROSS JOIN LATERAL cia_classify_temporal_view(COALESCE(matviewname, viewname)) AS c
) view_classification
GROUP BY temporal_granularity
ORDER BY 
    CASE temporal_granularity
        WHEN $16 THEN $17
        WHEN $18 THEN $19
        WHEN $20 THEN $21
        WHEN $22 THEN $23
        WHEN $24 THEN $25
        ELSE $26
    END

                    PERCENTILE_CONT($5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY crisis_party_discipline)::numeric AS p25,
                    PERCENTILE_CONT($6) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY crisis_party_discipline)::numeric AS median,
                    PERCENTILE_CONT($7) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY crisis_party_discipline)::numeric AS p75,
                    PERCENTILE_CONT($8) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY crisis_party_discipline)::numeric AS p90,
                    PERCENTILE_CONT($9) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY crisis_party_discipline)::numeric AS p99
                FROM view_riksdagen_crisis_resilience_indicators
                WHERE crisis_party_discipline IS NOT NULL

CREATE VIEW view_riksdagen_party_longitudinal_performance AS
WITH election_cycle_calendar AS (
    SELECT year_series AS calendar_year,
        CASE
            WHEN year_series >= 2002 AND year_series <= 2005 THEN 2002
            WHEN year_series >= 2006 AND year_series <= 2009 THEN 2006
            WHEN year_series >= 2010 AND year_series <= 2013 THEN 2010
            WHEN year_series >= 2014 AND year_series <= 2017 THEN 2014
            WHEN year_series >= 2018 AND year_series <= 2021 THEN 2018
            WHEN year_series >= 2022 AND year_series <= 2025 THEN 2022
            WHEN year_series >= 2026 AND year_series <= 2029 THEN 2026
            ELSE NULL
        END AS election_year,
        year_series -
        CASE
            WHEN year_series >= 2002 AND year_series <= 2005 THEN 2002
            WHEN year_series >= 2006 AND year_series <= 2009 THEN 2006
            WHEN year_series >= 2010 AND year_series <= 2013 THEN 2010
            WHEN year_series >= 2014 AND year_series <= 2017 THEN 2014
            WHEN year_series >= 2018 AND year_series <= 2021 THEN 2018
            WHEN year_series >= 2022 AND year_series <= 2025 THEN 2022
            WHEN year_series >= 2026 AND year_series <= 2029 THEN 2026
            ELSE NULL
        END + 1 AS cycle_year
    FROM generate_series(2002, EXTRACT(year FROM CURRENT_DATE)::integer + 4, 1) AS year_series
    WHERE year_series >= 2002
), election_cycle_periods AS (
    SELECT calendar_year, election_year, cycle_year,
        (election_year || '-' || (election_year + 3)) AS election_cycle_id,
        CASE WHEN cycle_year = 4 THEN true ELSE false END AS is_election_year
    FROM election_cycle_calendar WHERE election_year IS NOT NULL
), party_year_documents AS (
    SELECT party_short_code AS party,
           EXTRACT(year FROM made_public_date)::integer AS doc_year,
           count(*) AS docs_produced
    FROM view_riksdagen_politician_document
    WHERE made_public_date IS NOT NULL AND party_short_code IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY party_short_code, EXTRACT(year FROM made_public_date)::integer
), party_year_rebel AS (
    SELECT party,
           EXTRACT(year FROM embedded_id_vote_date)::integer AS rebel_year,
           avg(rebel_percentage) AS avg_rebel_rate
    FROM view_riksdagen_vote_data_ballot_politician_summary_annual
    WHERE party IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY party, EXTRACT(year FROM embedded_id_vote_date)::integer
), party_semester_data AS (
    SELECT ecp.election_cycle_id, ecp.cycle_year, ecp.calendar_year,
        CASE WHEN EXTRACT(month FROM vbps.embedded_id_vote_date) >= 9 OR EXTRACT(month FROM vbps.embedded_id_vote_date) <= 1 THEN 'autumn' ELSE 'spring' END AS semester,
        ecp.is_election_year,
        vbps.embedded_id_party AS party,
        sum(vbps.number_ballots) AS total_ballots,
        round(avg(100 - vbps.party_percentage_absent), 2) AS participation_rate,
        round(avg(vbps.party_won_percentage), 2) AS win_rate,
        round(avg(vbps.party_percentage_yes), 2) AS yes_rate,
        round(avg(vbps.party_percentage_no), 2) AS no_rate,
        round(avg(vbps.approved_percentage), 2) AS approval_rate,
        sum(vbps.party_total_votes) AS total_votes,
        sum(vbps.party_yes_votes) AS yes_votes,
        sum(vbps.party_won_total) AS ballots_won,
        sum(vbps.approved_total) AS decisions_approved
    FROM election_cycle_periods ecp
        JOIN view_riksdagen_vote_data_ballot_party_summary_annual vbps ON date_part('year', vbps.embedded_id_vote_date) = ecp.calendar_year::double precision
    WHERE vbps.embedded_id_party IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY ecp.election_cycle_id, ecp.cycle_year, ecp.calendar_year,
        CASE WHEN EXTRACT(month FROM vbps.embedded_id_vote_date) >= 9 OR EXTRACT(month FROM vbps.embedded_id_vote_date) <= 1 THEN 'autumn' ELSE 'spring' END,
        ecp.is_election_year, vbps.embedded_id_party
), enhanced_metrics AS (
    SELECT psd.*,
        (avg(psd.total_votes::numeric / NULLIF(psd.total_ballots, 0)))::integer AS active_members,
        COALESCE(max(pyd.docs_produced), 0)::bigint AS documents_last_year,
        round(COALESCE(avg(pyr.avg_rebel_rate), 0), 2) AS avg_rebel_rate,
        round(psd.win_rate * 0.30 + psd.participation_rate * 0.25 + psd.approval_rate * 0.25 + (100 - COALESCE(avg(pyr.avg_rebel_rate), 0)) * 0.20, 2) AS current_performance_score
    FROM party_semester_data psd
        LEFT JOIN party_year_documents pyd ON pyd.party = psd.party AND pyd.doc_year = psd.calendar_year
        LEFT JOIN party_year_rebel pyr ON pyr.party = psd.party AND pyr.rebel_year = psd.calendar_year
    GROUP BY psd.election_cycle_id, psd.cycle_year, psd.calendar_year, psd.semester,
        psd.is_election_year, psd.party, psd.total_ballots, psd.participation_rate,
        psd.win_rate, psd.yes_rate, psd.no_rate, psd.approval_rate,
        psd.total_votes, psd.yes_votes, psd.ballots_won, psd.decisions_approved
), windowed_statistics AS (
    SELECT em.*,
        rank() OVER (PARTITION BY em.election_cycle_id, em.semester ORDER BY em.win_rate DESC NULLS LAST) AS rank_by_win_rate,
        rank() OVER (PARTITION BY em.election_cycle_id, em.semester ORDER BY em.participation_rate DESC NULLS LAST) AS rank_by_participation,
        rank() OVER (PARTITION BY em.election_cycle_id, em.semester ORDER BY em.approval_rate DESC NULLS LAST) AS rank_by_approval,
        rank() OVER (PARTITION BY em.election_cycle_id, em.semester ORDER BY em.avg_rebel_rate ASC NULLS LAST) AS rank_by_discipline,
        rank() OVER (PARTITION BY em.election_cycle_id, em.semester ORDER BY em.active_members DESC NULLS LAST) AS rank_by_size,
        rank() OVER (PARTITION BY em.election_cycle_id, em.semester ORDER BY em.documents_last_year DESC NULLS LAST) AS rank_by_productivity,
        percent_rank() OVER (PARTITION BY em.election_cycle_id, em.semester ORDER BY em.win_rate DESC NULLS LAST) AS percentile_win_rate,
        percent_rank() OVER (PARTITION BY em.election_cycle_id, em.semester ORDER BY em.participation_rate DESC NULLS LAST) AS percentile_participation,
        percent_rank() OVER (PARTITION BY em.election_cycle_id, em.semester ORDER BY em.approval_rate DESC NULLS LAST) AS percentile_approval,
        percent_rank() OVER (PARTITION BY em.election_cycle_id, em.semester ORDER BY em.documents_last_year DESC NULLS LAST) AS percentile_productivity,
        ntile(4) OVER (PARTITION BY em.election_cycle_id, em.semester ORDER BY em.win_rate DESC NULLS LAST) AS quartile_by_win_rate,
        ntile(4) OVER (PARTITION BY em.election_cycle_id, em.semester ORDER BY em.current_performance_score DESC NULLS LAST) AS quartile_by_overall_performance,
        lag(em.win_rate) OVER (PARTITION BY em.party ORDER BY em.election_cycle_id, em.cycle_year, em.semester) AS prev_semester_win_rate,
        lag(em.participation_rate) OVER (PARTITION BY em.party ORDER BY em.election_cycle_id, em.cycle_year, em.semester) AS prev_semester_participation,
        lag(em.active_members) OVER (PARTITION BY em.party ORDER BY em.election_cycle_id, em.cycle_year, em.semester) AS prev_semester_members,
        lag(em.approval_rate) OVER (PARTITION BY em.party ORDER BY em.election_cycle_id, em.cycle_year, em.semester) AS prev_semester_approval,
        lag(em.documents_last_year) OVER (PARTITION BY em.party ORDER BY em.election_cycle_id, em.cycle_year, em.semester) AS prev_semester_documents,
        lag(em.avg_rebel_rate) OVER (PARTITION BY em.party ORDER BY em.election_cycle_id, em.cycle_year, em.semester) AS prev_semester_rebel_rate,
        lead(em.win_rate) OVER (PARTITION BY em.party ORDER BY em.election_cycle_id, em.cycle_year, em.semester) AS next_semester_win_rate,
        lead(em.participation_rate) OVER (PARTITION BY em.party ORDER BY em.election_cycle_id, em.cycle_year, em.semester) AS next_semester_participation,
        lead(em.active_members) OVER (PARTITION BY em.party ORDER BY em.election_cycle_id, em.cycle_year, em.semester) AS next_semester_members,
        stddev_pop(em.win_rate) OVER (PARTITION BY em.election_cycle_id, em.semester) AS stddev_win_rate_sector,
        stddev_pop(em.participation_rate) OVER (PARTITION BY em.election_cycle_id, em.semester) AS stddev_participation_sector,
        stddev_pop(em.win_rate) OVER (PARTITION BY em.party) AS stddev_win_rate_party,
        stddev_pop(em.participation_rate) OVER (PARTITION BY em.party) AS stddev_participation_party,
        avg(em.win_rate) OVER (PARTITION BY em.party ORDER BY em.election_cycle_id, em.cycle_year, em.semester ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS ma_3semester_win_rate,
        avg(em.participation_rate) OVER (PARTITION BY em.party ORDER BY em.election_cycle_id, em.cycle_year, em.semester ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS ma_3semester_participation
    FROM enhanced_metrics em
)
SELECT election_cycle_id, cycle_year, calendar_year, semester, is_election_year, party,
    total_ballots, participation_rate, win_rate, yes_rate, no_rate, approval_rate,
    total_votes, yes_votes, ballots_won, decisions_approved,
    active_members, documents_last_year, avg_rebel_rate, current_performance_score,
    rank_by_win_rate, rank_by_participation, rank_by_approval, rank_by_discipline, rank_by_size, rank_by_productivity,
    percentile_win_rate, percentile_participation, percentile_approval, percentile_productivity,
    quartile_by_win_rate, quartile_by_overall_performance,
    prev_semester_win_rate, prev_semester_participation, prev_semester_members,
    prev_semester_approval, prev_semester_documents, prev_semester_rebel_rate,
    next_semester_win_rate, next_semester_participation, next_semester_members,
    stddev_win_rate_sector, stddev_participation_sector, stddev_win_rate_party, stddev_participation_party,
    ma_3semester_win_rate, ma_3semester_participation,
    CASE WHEN prev_semester_win_rate IS NOT NULL THEN round(win_rate - prev_semester_win_rate, 2) ELSE NULL END AS win_rate_change_absolute,
    CASE WHEN prev_semester_win_rate IS NOT NULL AND prev_semester_win_rate > 0 THEN round((win_rate - prev_semester_win_rate) / prev_semester_win_rate * 100, 2) ELSE NULL END AS win_rate_change_pct,
    CASE WHEN prev_semester_participation IS NOT NULL THEN round(participation_rate - prev_semester_participation, 2) ELSE NULL END AS participation_change_absolute,
    CASE WHEN prev_semester_members IS NOT NULL THEN active_members - prev_semester_members ELSE NULL END AS membership_change,
    CASE WHEN prev_semester_approval IS NOT NULL THEN round(approval_rate - prev_semester_approval, 2) ELSE NULL END AS approval_rate_change,
    CASE WHEN prev_semester_documents IS NOT NULL THEN documents_last_year - prev_semester_documents ELSE NULL END AS documents_change,
    CASE WHEN prev_semester_rebel_rate IS NOT NULL THEN round(avg_rebel_rate - prev_semester_rebel_rate, 2) ELSE NULL END AS discipline_change,
    CASE WHEN prev_semester_win_rate IS NOT NULL THEN
        CASE WHEN win_rate > prev_semester_win_rate + 3 THEN 'IMPROVING' WHEN win_rate < prev_semester_win_rate - 3 THEN 'DECLINING' ELSE 'STABLE' END
    ELSE 'NEW_ENTRY' END AS trajectory_win_rate,
    CASE WHEN prev_semester_participation IS NOT NULL THEN
        CASE WHEN participation_rate > prev_semester_participation + 3 THEN 'IMPROVING' WHEN participation_rate < prev_semester_participation - 3 THEN 'DECLINING' ELSE 'STABLE' END
    ELSE 'NEW_ENTRY' END AS trajectory_participation,
    round(win_rate * 0.35 + participation_rate * 0.25 + approval_rate * 0.20
        + active_members::numeric / NULLIF(max(active_members) OVER (PARTITION BY election_cycle_id, semester), 0)::numeric * 100 * 0.10
        + documents_last_year::numeric / NULLIF(max(documents_last_year) OVER (PARTITION BY election_cycle_id, semester), 0)::numeric * 100 * 0.10, 2) AS composite_performance_index,
    round(participation_rate * 0.5 + (100 - COALESCE(avg_rebel_rate, 0)) * 0.5, 2) AS discipline_effectiveness_score,
    round(win_rate * 0.30 + participation_rate * 0.25 + approval_rate * 0.25 + (100 - COALESCE(avg_rebel_rate, 0)) * 0.20, 2) AS legislative_effectiveness_score,
    CASE WHEN stddev_win_rate_party > 10 THEN 'HIGHLY_VOLATILE' WHEN stddev_win_rate_party > 5 THEN 'MODERATELY_VOLATILE' ELSE 'STABLE' END AS volatility_classification,
    CASE WHEN stddev_participation_party IS NOT NULL AND stddev_participation_party < 3 THEN 'VERY_STABLE' WHEN stddev_participation_party < 5 THEN 'STABLE' WHEN stddev_participation_party < 10 THEN 'MODERATE' ELSE 'UNSTABLE' END AS stability_classification,
    CASE WHEN next_semester_win_rate IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN next_semester_win_rate > win_rate THEN 'IMPROVING' WHEN next_semester_win_rate < win_rate THEN 'DECLINING' ELSE 'STABLE' END ELSE NULL END AS forecast_trend,
    CASE WHEN ma_3semester_win_rate IS NOT NULL THEN round(win_rate - ma_3semester_win_rate, 2) ELSE NULL END AS trend_deviation_from_ma,
    CASE WHEN stddev_win_rate_party > 0 AND prev_semester_win_rate IS NOT NULL THEN round((win_rate - prev_semester_win_rate) / NULLIF(stddev_win_rate_party, 0), 2) ELSE NULL END AS momentum_z_score_win_rate,
    CASE WHEN stddev_participation_party > 0 AND prev_semester_participation IS NOT NULL THEN round((participation_rate - prev_semester_participation) / NULLIF(stddev_participation_party, 0), 2) ELSE NULL END AS momentum_z_score_participation,
    CASE WHEN prev_semester_win_rate IS NOT NULL AND prev_semester_participation IS NOT NULL THEN
        round(LEAST(1.0, (4 - abs(win_rate - prev_semester_win_rate) / GREATEST(stddev_win_rate_party, 1)) / 4), 2)
    ELSE NULL END AS trajectory_confidence_score,
    CASE
        WHEN quartile_by_win_rate = 1 AND rank_by_productivity <= 3 THEN 'TOP_PERFORMER'
        WHEN quartile_by_win_rate <= 2 THEN 'STRONG'
        WHEN quartile_by_win_rate <= 3 THEN 'AVERAGE'
        ELSE 'UNDERPERFORMING'
    END AS performance_tier,
    CASE
        WHEN rank_by_productivity <= 3 AND documents_last_year > 100 THEN 'HIGHLY_PRODUCTIVE'
        WHEN rank_by_productivity <= 5 THEN 'PRODUCTIVE'
        ELSE 'LOW_PRODUCTIVITY'
    END AS productivity_tier,
    CASE WHEN stddev_win_rate_party > 0 THEN round((win_rate - ma_3semester_win_rate) / NULLIF(stddev_win_rate_party, 0), 2) ELSE NULL END AS trend_position,
    CASE
        WHEN prev_semester_win_rate IS NOT NULL AND (win_rate - prev_semester_win_rate) < -5 AND (participation_rate - COALESCE(prev_semester_participation, participation_rate)) < -3 THEN 'DECLINING'
        WHEN prev_semester_win_rate IS NOT NULL AND (win_rate - prev_semester_win_rate) > 5 AND (participation_rate - COALESCE(prev_semester_participation, participation_rate)) > 3 THEN 'SURGING'
        ELSE NULL
    END AS early_warning_flag,
    (cycle_year = 4 AND semester = 'spring') AS is_pre_election_spring,
    (cycle_year = 4 AND semester = 'autumn') AS is_election_autumn,
    (cycle_year = 4) AS is_election_cycle_end
FROM windowed_statistics

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW view_riksdagen_crisis_resilience_indicators AS
WITH monthly_activity AS (
    SELECT date_trunc('month', vote_date::timestamp with time zone) AS activity_month,
        count(DISTINCT embedded_id_ballot_id) AS ballot_count
    FROM vote_data WHERE vote_date >= (CURRENT_DATE - interval '25 years')
    GROUP BY date_trunc('month', vote_date::timestamp with time zone)
), activity_thresholds AS (
    SELECT percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ballot_count::double precision) AS median_ballots,
        percentile_cont(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ballot_count::double precision) AS p75_ballots,
        avg(ballot_count) AS avg_ballots
    FROM monthly_activity
), classified_periods AS (
    SELECT ma.activity_month, ma.ballot_count,
        CASE WHEN ma.ballot_count::double precision >= at.p75_ballots THEN 'CRISIS'
             WHEN ma.ballot_count::double precision >= at.median_ballots THEN 'ELEVATED'
             ELSE 'NORMAL' END AS period_type
    FROM monthly_activity ma CROSS JOIN activity_thresholds at
), crisis_voting AS (
    SELECT bps.embedded_id_intressent_id AS person_id, bps.party,
        count(*) AS crisis_votes,
        count(*) FILTER (WHERE UPPER(bps.vote) = 'FRÅNVARANDE') AS crisis_absent,
        count(*) FILTER (WHERE UPPER(bps.vote) = 'JA') AS crisis_yes,
        count(*) FILTER (WHERE UPPER(bps.vote) = 'NEJ') AS crisis_no,
        count(*) FILTER (WHERE bps.rebel = true) AS crisis_rebellions
    FROM view_riksdagen_vote_data_ballot_politician_summary bps
      JOIN classified_periods cp ON date_trunc('month', bps.vote_date::timestamp with time zone) = cp.activity_month
        AND cp.period_type IN ('CRISIS', 'ELEVATED')
    GROUP BY bps.embedded_id_intressent_id, bps.party
), normal_voting AS (
    SELECT bps.embedded_id_intressent_id AS person_id,
        count(*) AS normal_votes,
        count(*) FILTER (WHERE UPPER(bps.vote) = 'FRÅNVARANDE') AS normal_absent,
        count(*) FILTER (WHERE UPPER(bps.vote) = 'JA') AS normal_yes,
        count(*) FILTER (WHERE UPPER(bps.vote) = 'NEJ') AS normal_no,
        count(*) FILTER (WHERE bps.rebel = true) AS normal_rebellions
    FROM view_riksdagen_vote_data_ballot_politician_summary bps
      JOIN classified_periods cp ON date_trunc('month', bps.vote_date::timestamp with time zone) = cp.activity_month
        AND cp.period_type = 'NORMAL'
    GROUP BY bps.embedded_id_intressent_id
), all_voting_politicians AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT embedded_id_intressent_id AS person_id FROM vote_data WHERE vote_date >= (CURRENT_DATE - interval '25 years')
)
SELECT p.id AS person_id, p.first_name, p.last_name, p.party,
    COALESCE(cv.crisis_votes, 0) AS crisis_period_votes,
    round((COALESCE(cv.crisis_absent, 0)::numeric / NULLIF(cv.crisis_votes, 0)::numeric) * 100, 2) AS crisis_absence_rate,
    round(100 - (COALESCE(cv.crisis_rebellions, 0)::numeric / NULLIF(cv.crisis_votes, 0)::numeric) * 100, 2) AS crisis_party_discipline,
    COALESCE(nv.normal_votes, 0) AS normal_period_votes,
    round((COALESCE(nv.normal_absent, 0)::numeric / NULLIF(nv.normal_votes, 0)::numeric) * 100, 2) AS normal_absence_rate,
    round(((COALESCE(cv.crisis_absent, 0)::numeric / NULLIF(cv.crisis_votes, 0)::numeric) * 100) - ((COALESCE(nv.normal_absent, 0)::numeric / NULLIF(nv.normal_votes, 0)::numeric) * 100), 2) AS absence_rate_change,
    round(CASE WHEN COALESCE(cv.crisis_votes, 0) < 5 THEN NULL
        ELSE (50 - LEAST(50, (COALESCE(cv.crisis_absent, 0)::numeric / NULLIF(cv.crisis_votes, 0)::numeric) * 100))
             + (30 - LEAST(30, abs(((COALESCE(cv.crisis_absent, 0)::numeric / NULLIF(cv.crisis_votes, 0)::numeric) * 100) - ((COALESCE(nv.normal_absent, 0)::numeric / NULLIF(nv.normal_votes, 0)::numeric) * 100))))
             + (20 - LEAST(20, (COALESCE(cv.crisis_rebellions, 0)::numeric / NULLIF(cv.crisis_votes, 0)::numeric) * 100))
    END, 4) AS resilience_score,
    CASE
        WHEN COALESCE(cv.crisis_votes, 0) >= 10 AND (COALESCE(cv.crisis_absent, 0)::numeric / NULLIF(cv.crisis_votes, 0)::numeric) < 0.1 THEN 'HIGHLY_RESILIENT'
        WHEN COALESCE(cv.crisis_votes, 0) >= 5 AND (COALESCE(cv.crisis_absent, 0)::numeric / NULLIF(cv.crisis_votes, 0)::numeric) < 0.2 THEN 'RESILIENT'
        WHEN COALESCE(cv.crisis_votes, 0) >= 5 AND (COALESCE(cv.crisis_absent, 0)::numeric / NULLIF(cv.crisis_votes, 0)::numeric) < 0.4 THEN 'MODERATE_RESILIENCE'
        WHEN COALESCE(cv.crisis_votes, 0) < 5 THEN 'INSUFFICIENT_DATA'
        ELSE 'LOW_RESILIENCE'
    END AS resilience_classification,
    CASE
        WHEN COALESCE(cv.crisis_votes, 0) >= 10 AND (COALESCE(cv.crisis_absent, 0)::numeric / NULLIF(cv.crisis_votes, 0)::numeric) < 0.1 THEN 'Highly engaged during crisis periods - strong institutional resilience'
        WHEN COALESCE(cv.crisis_votes, 0) >= 5 AND (COALESCE(cv.crisis_absent, 0)::numeric / NULLIF(cv.crisis_votes, 0)::numeric) < 0.2 THEN 'Good crisis response - reliable during high-activity periods'
        WHEN COALESCE(cv.crisis_votes, 0) >= 5 AND (COALESCE(cv.crisis_absent, 0)::numeric / NULLIF(cv.crisis_votes, 0)::numeric) < 0.4 THEN 'Moderate crisis engagement - some absence during critical votes'
        WHEN COALESCE(cv.crisis_votes, 0) < 5 THEN 'Insufficient crisis period data for assessment'
        ELSE 'Poor crisis response - high absence during high-activity periods'
    END AS pressure_performance_assessment
FROM person_data p
  JOIN all_voting_politicians avp ON avp.person_id::text = p.id::text
  LEFT JOIN crisis_voting cv ON cv.person_id::text = p.id::text
  LEFT JOIN normal_voting nv ON nv.person_id::text = p.id::text
WHERE (p.status)::text = ANY (ARRAY['Tjänstgörande riksdagsledamot', 'Tjänstgörande ersättare', 'Tillgänglig ersättare'])
ORDER BY
    CASE
        WHEN COALESCE(cv.crisis_votes, 0) >= 10 AND (COALESCE(cv.crisis_absent, 0)::numeric / NULLIF(cv.crisis_votes, 0)::numeric) < 0.1 THEN 1
        WHEN COALESCE(cv.crisis_votes, 0) >= 5 AND (COALESCE(cv.crisis_absent, 0)::numeric / NULLIF(cv.crisis_votes, 0)::numeric) < 0.2 THEN 2
        WHEN COALESCE(cv.crisis_votes, 0) >= 5 AND (COALESCE(cv.crisis_absent, 0)::numeric / NULLIF(cv.crisis_votes, 0)::numeric) < 0.4 THEN 3
        WHEN COALESCE(cv.crisis_votes, 0) < 5 THEN 5
        ELSE 4
    END, COALESCE(cv.crisis_votes, 0) DESC

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW public.view_riksdagen_committee_role_member AS SELECT a.hjid AS role_id,
    a.detail,
    a.role_code,
    p.first_name,
    p.last_name,
    a.from_date,
    a.to_date,
    p.id AS person_id,
    p.party,
    (CASE WHEN a.to_date > CURRENT_DATE THEN CURRENT_DATE ELSE a.to_date END
     - CASE WHEN a.from_date > CURRENT_DATE THEN CURRENT_DATE ELSE a.from_date END) AS total_days_served,
    CASE WHEN a.to_date > CURRENT_DATE AND a.from_date < CURRENT_DATE THEN true ELSE false END AS active,
    COALESCE(doc_stats.total_documents, 0::bigint) AS total_documents,
    COALESCE(doc_stats.documents_last_year, 0::bigint) AS documents_last_year,
    COALESCE(doc_stats.committee_motions, 0::bigint) AS total_committee_reports,
    COALESCE(doc_stats.propositions, 0::bigint) AS total_statements,
    COALESCE(doc_stats.initiatives, 0::bigint) AS total_initiatives,
    CASE
        WHEN COALESCE(doc_stats.documents_last_year, 0::bigint) > 40 THEN 'Very High'
        WHEN COALESCE(doc_stats.documents_last_year, 0::bigint) > 20 THEN 'High'
        WHEN COALESCE(doc_stats.documents_last_year, 0::bigint) > 10 THEN 'Medium'
        WHEN COALESCE(doc_stats.documents_last_year, 0::bigint) > 0 THEN 'Low'
        ELSE 'Inactive'
    END AS activity_level,
    CASE
        WHEN a.role_code::text = 'Ordförande' THEN 'Chairman'
        WHEN a.role_code::text = 'Förste vice ordförande' THEN 'First Vice Chairman'
        WHEN a.role_code::text = 'Andre vice ordförande' THEN 'Second Vice Chairman'
        WHEN a.role_code::text = 'Tredje vice ordförande' THEN 'Third Vice Chairman'
        WHEN a.role_code::text = 'Vice ordförande' THEN 'Vice Chairman'
        WHEN a.role_code::text = 'Ledamot' THEN 'Member'
        WHEN a.role_code::text = 'Suppleant' THEN 'Deputy Member'
        WHEN a.role_code::text = 'Extra suppleant' THEN 'Additional Deputy'
        WHEN a.role_code::text = 'Deputerad' THEN 'Deputy'
        ELSE 'Other'
    END AS role_type,
    CASE
        WHEN a.detail::text = 'Arbetsmarknadsutskottet' THEN 'Labor Market'
        WHEN a.detail::text = 'Civilutskottet' THEN 'Civil Affairs'
        WHEN a.detail::text = 'Finansutskottet' THEN 'Finance'
        WHEN a.detail::text = 'Försvarsutskottet' THEN 'Defense'
        WHEN a.detail::text = 'Justitieutskottet' THEN 'Justice'
        WHEN a.detail::text = 'Konstitutionsutskottet' THEN 'Constitution'
        WHEN a.detail::text = 'Kulturutskottet' THEN 'Culture'
        WHEN a.detail::text = 'Miljö- och jordbruksutskottet' THEN 'Environment and Agriculture'
        WHEN a.detail::text = 'Näringsutskottet' THEN 'Industry and Trade'
        WHEN a.detail::text = 'Skatteutskottet' THEN 'Taxation'
        WHEN a.detail::text = 'Socialförsäkringsutskottet' THEN 'Social Insurance'
        WHEN a.detail::text = 'Socialutskottet' THEN 'Social Affairs'
        WHEN a.detail::text = 'Trafikutskottet' THEN 'Transport'
        WHEN a.detail::text = 'Utbildningsutskottet' THEN 'Education'
        WHEN a.detail::text = 'Utrikesutskottet' THEN 'Foreign Affairs'
        WHEN a.detail::text LIKE 'Sammansatta%' THEN 'Joint Committee'
        WHEN a.detail::text = 'EU-nämnden' THEN 'EU Affairs'
        WHEN a.detail::text = 'Lagutskottet' THEN 'Law'
        WHEN a.detail::text = 'Bostadsutskottet' THEN 'Housing'
        ELSE 'Other'
    END AS committee_type
FROM assignment_data a
  LEFT JOIN person_data p ON a.intressent_id::text = p.id::text
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT person_reference_id,
        count(*) AS total_documents,
        count(CASE WHEN made_public_date >= (CURRENT_DATE - interval '1 year') THEN 1 END) AS documents_last_year,
        count(CASE WHEN document_type = 'mot' AND sub_type = 'Kommittémotion' THEN 1 END) AS committee_motions,
        count(CASE WHEN document_type = 'prop' THEN 1 END) AS propositions,
        count(CASE WHEN document_type IN ('mot','prop','frs') THEN 1 END) AS initiatives
    FROM view_riksdagen_politician_document
    WHERE made_public_date >= (CURRENT_DATE - interval '25 years')
    GROUP BY person_reference_id
  ) doc_stats ON doc_stats.person_reference_id::text = p.id::text
WHERE a.org_code IS NOT NULL AND a.assignment_type = 'uppdrag'
ORDER BY a.detail,
    CASE a.role_code
        WHEN 'Ordförande' THEN 1
        WHEN 'Förste vice ordförande' THEN 2
        WHEN 'Andre vice ordförande' THEN 3
        WHEN 'Tredje vice ordförande' THEN 4
        WHEN 'Vice ordförande' THEN 5
        WHEN 'Ledamot' THEN 6
        WHEN 'Suppleant' THEN 7
        WHEN 'Extra suppleant' THEN 8
        ELSE 9
    END, a.from_date DESC

CREATE VIEW view_riksdagen_party_electoral_trends AS
WITH election_cycle_periods AS (
    SELECT year_series AS calendar_year,
        CASE
            WHEN year_series >= 2002 AND year_series <= 2005 THEN 2002
            WHEN year_series >= 2006 AND year_series <= 2009 THEN 2006
            WHEN year_series >= 2010 AND year_series <= 2013 THEN 2010
            WHEN year_series >= 2014 AND year_series <= 2017 THEN 2014
            WHEN year_series >= 2018 AND year_series <= 2021 THEN 2018
            WHEN year_series >= 2022 AND year_series <= 2025 THEN 2022
            WHEN year_series >= 2026 AND year_series <= 2029 THEN 2026
            ELSE NULL
        END AS election_year,
        year_series -
        CASE
            WHEN year_series >= 2002 AND year_series <= 2005 THEN 2002
            WHEN year_series >= 2006 AND year_series <= 2009 THEN 2006
            WHEN year_series >= 2010 AND year_series <= 2013 THEN 2010
            WHEN year_series >= 2014 AND year_series <= 2017 THEN 2014
            WHEN year_series >= 2018 AND year_series <= 2021 THEN 2018
            WHEN year_series >= 2022 AND year_series <= 2025 THEN 2022
            WHEN year_series >= 2026 AND year_series <= 2029 THEN 2026
            ELSE NULL
        END + 1 AS cycle_year,
        (CASE
            WHEN year_series >= 2002 AND year_series <= 2005 THEN 2002
            WHEN year_series >= 2006 AND year_series <= 2009 THEN 2006
            WHEN year_series >= 2010 AND year_series <= 2013 THEN 2010
            WHEN year_series >= 2014 AND year_series <= 2017 THEN 2014
            WHEN year_series >= 2018 AND year_series <= 2021 THEN 2018
            WHEN year_series >= 2022 AND year_series <= 2025 THEN 2022
            WHEN year_series >= 2026 AND year_series <= 2029 THEN 2026
            ELSE NULL
        END || '-' ||
        CASE
            WHEN year_series >= 2002 AND year_series <= 2005 THEN 2005
            WHEN year_series >= 2006 AND year_series <= 2009 THEN 2009
            WHEN year_series >= 2010 AND year_series <= 2013 THEN 2013
            WHEN year_series >= 2014 AND year_series <= 2017 THEN 2017
            WHEN year_series >= 2018 AND year_series <= 2021 THEN 2021
            WHEN year_series >= 2022 AND year_series <= 2025 THEN 2025
            WHEN year_series >= 2026 AND year_series <= 2029 THEN 2029
            ELSE NULL
        END) AS election_cycle_id
    FROM generate_series(2002, EXTRACT(year FROM CURRENT_DATE)::integer + 4, 1) AS year_series
    WHERE year_series >= 2002
), party_year_documents AS (
    SELECT party_short_code AS party,
           EXTRACT(year FROM made_public_date)::integer AS doc_year,
           count(*) AS docs_produced
    FROM view_riksdagen_politician_document
    WHERE made_public_date IS NOT NULL AND party_short_code IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY party_short_code, EXTRACT(year FROM made_public_date)::integer
), party_year_rebel AS (
    SELECT party,
           EXTRACT(year FROM embedded_id_vote_date)::integer AS rebel_year,
           avg(rebel_percentage) AS avg_rebel_rate
    FROM view_riksdagen_vote_data_ballot_politician_summary_annual
    WHERE party IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY party, EXTRACT(year FROM embedded_id_vote_date)::integer
), electoral_semester_data AS (
    SELECT ecp.election_cycle_id,
        ecp.cycle_year,
        ecp.calendar_year,
        CASE
            WHEN EXTRACT(month FROM vbps.embedded_id_vote_date) >= 9
                OR EXTRACT(month FROM vbps.embedded_id_vote_date) <= 1 THEN 'autumn'
            ELSE 'spring'
        END AS semester,
        vbps.embedded_id_party AS party,
        sum(vbps.number_ballots) AS ballots_participated,
        round(avg(vbps.party_won_percentage), 2) AS win_rate,
        round(avg(vbps.party_percentage_yes), 2) AS yes_rate,
        round(avg(vbps.approved_percentage), 2) AS approval_rate,
        round(avg(100 - vbps.party_percentage_absent), 2) AS participation_rate,
        (avg(vbps.party_total_votes::numeric / NULLIF(vbps.number_ballots, 0)))::integer AS seat_count_proxy,
        COALESCE(max(pyd.docs_produced), 0) AS documents_produced,
        round(COALESCE(avg(pyr.avg_rebel_rate), 0), 2) AS avg_rebel_rate
    FROM election_cycle_periods ecp
        JOIN view_riksdagen_vote_data_ballot_party_summary_annual vbps
            ON date_part('year', vbps.embedded_id_vote_date) = ecp.calendar_year::double precision
        LEFT JOIN party_year_documents pyd
            ON pyd.party = vbps.embedded_id_party
            AND pyd.doc_year = ecp.calendar_year
        LEFT JOIN party_year_rebel pyr
            ON pyr.party = vbps.embedded_id_party
            AND pyr.rebel_year = ecp.calendar_year
    WHERE vbps.embedded_id_party IS NOT NULL AND ecp.election_year IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY ecp.election_cycle_id, ecp.cycle_year, ecp.calendar_year,
        CASE
            WHEN EXTRACT(month FROM vbps.embedded_id_vote_date) >= 9
                OR EXTRACT(month FROM vbps.embedded_id_vote_date) <= 1 THEN 'autumn'
            ELSE 'spring'
        END, vbps.embedded_id_party
), windowed_statistics AS (
    SELECT esd.election_cycle_id,
        esd.cycle_year,
        esd.calendar_year,
        esd.semester,
        esd.party,
        esd.ballots_participated,
        esd.win_rate,
        esd.yes_rate,
        esd.approval_rate,
        esd.participation_rate,
        esd.seat_count_proxy,
        esd.documents_produced,
        esd.avg_rebel_rate,
        rank() OVER (PARTITION BY esd.election_cycle_id, esd.semester ORDER BY esd.seat_count_proxy DESC NULLS LAST) AS rank_by_seats,
        rank() OVER (PARTITION BY esd.election_cycle_id, esd.semester ORDER BY esd.win_rate DESC NULLS LAST) AS rank_by_win_rate,
        rank() OVER (PARTITION BY esd.election_cycle_id, esd.semester ORDER BY esd.documents_produced DESC NULLS LAST) AS rank_by_productivity,
        percent_rank() OVER (PARTITION BY esd.election_cycle_id, esd.semester ORDER BY esd.seat_count_proxy DESC NULLS LAST) AS percentile_seats,
        percent_rank() OVER (PARTITION BY esd.election_cycle_id, esd.semester ORDER BY esd.win_rate DESC NULLS LAST) AS percentile_win_rate,
        percent_rank() OVER (PARTITION BY esd.election_cycle_id, esd.semester ORDER BY esd.documents_produced DESC NULLS LAST) AS percentile_productivity,
        ntile(4) OVER (PARTITION BY esd.election_cycle_id, esd.semester ORDER BY esd.seat_count_proxy DESC NULLS LAST) AS quartile_by_size,
        lag(esd.seat_count_proxy) OVER (PARTITION BY esd.party ORDER BY esd.election_cycle_id, esd.cycle_year, esd.semester) AS prev_semester_seats,
        lag(esd.win_rate) OVER (PARTITION BY esd.party ORDER BY esd.election_cycle_id, esd.cycle_year, esd.semester) AS prev_semester_win_rate,
        lag(esd.documents_produced) OVER (PARTITION BY esd.party ORDER BY esd.election_cycle_id, esd.cycle_year, esd.semester) AS prev_semester_documents,
        lag(esd.participation_rate) OVER (PARTITION BY esd.party ORDER BY esd.election_cycle_id, esd.cycle_year, esd.semester) AS prev_semester_participation,
        lead(esd.seat_count_proxy) OVER (PARTITION BY esd.party ORDER BY esd.election_cycle_id, esd.cycle_year, esd.semester) AS next_semester_seats,
        lead(esd.win_rate) OVER (PARTITION BY esd.party ORDER BY esd.election_cycle_id, esd.cycle_year, esd.semester) AS next_semester_win_rate,
        stddev_pop(esd.seat_count_proxy) OVER (PARTITION BY esd.election_cycle_id, esd.semester) AS stddev_seats_sector,
        stddev_pop(esd.win_rate) OVER (PARTITION BY esd.election_cycle_id, esd.semester) AS stddev_win_rate_sector,
        stddev_pop(esd.seat_count_proxy) OVER (PARTITION BY esd.party) AS stddev_seats_party,
        stddev_pop(esd.win_rate) OVER (PARTITION BY esd.party) AS stddev_win_rate_party,
        avg(esd.seat_count_proxy) OVER (PARTITION BY esd.party ORDER BY esd.election_cycle_id, esd.cycle_year, esd.semester ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS ma_3semester_seats,
        avg(esd.win_rate) OVER (PARTITION BY esd.party ORDER BY esd.election_cycle_id, esd.cycle_year, esd.semester ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS ma_3semester_win_rate
    FROM electoral_semester_data esd
)
SELECT election_cycle_id,
    cycle_year,
    calendar_year,
    semester,
    party,
    ballots_participated,
    win_rate,
    yes_rate,
    approval_rate,
    participation_rate,
    seat_count_proxy,
    documents_produced,
    avg_rebel_rate,
    rank_by_seats,
    rank_by_win_rate,
    rank_by_productivity,
    percentile_seats,
    percentile_win_rate,
    percentile_productivity,
    quartile_by_size,
    prev_semester_seats,
    prev_semester_win_rate,
    prev_semester_documents,
    prev_semester_participation,
    next_semester_seats,
    next_semester_win_rate,
    stddev_seats_sector,
    stddev_win_rate_sector,
    stddev_seats_party,
    stddev_win_rate_party,
    ma_3semester_seats,
    ma_3semester_win_rate,
    CASE
        WHEN prev_semester_seats IS NOT NULL THEN seat_count_proxy - prev_semester_seats
        ELSE NULL
    END AS seat_change_absolute,
    CASE
        WHEN prev_semester_seats IS NOT NULL AND prev_semester_seats > 0
            THEN round((seat_count_proxy - prev_semester_seats)::numeric / prev_semester_seats * 100, 2)
        ELSE NULL
    END AS seat_change_pct,
    CASE
        WHEN prev_semester_win_rate IS NOT NULL THEN round(win_rate - prev_semester_win_rate, 2)
        ELSE NULL
    END AS win_rate_change_absolute,
    CASE
        WHEN prev_semester_win_rate IS NOT NULL AND prev_semester_win_rate > 0
            THEN round((win_rate - prev_semester_win_rate) / prev_semester_win_rate * 100, 2)
        ELSE NULL
    END AS win_rate_change_pct,
    CASE
        WHEN prev_semester_documents IS NOT NULL THEN documents_produced - prev_semester_documents
        ELSE NULL
    END AS documents_change,
    CASE
        WHEN stddev_seats_party > 15 THEN 'HIGHLY_VOLATILE'
        WHEN stddev_seats_party > 10 THEN 'MODERATELY_VOLATILE'
        WHEN stddev_seats_party > 5 THEN 'SLIGHTLY_VOLATILE'
        ELSE 'STABLE'
    END AS volatility_classification,
    round(seat_count_proxy::numeric - ma_3semester_seats, 2) AS seat_deviation_from_ma,
    CASE
        WHEN prev_semester_seats IS NOT NULL AND stddev_seats_party > 0
            THEN round((seat_count_proxy - prev_semester_seats)::numeric / NULLIF(stddev_seats_party, 0), 2)
        ELSE NULL
    END AS momentum_z_score_seats,
    CASE
        WHEN prev_semester_win_rate IS NOT NULL AND stddev_win_rate_party > 0
            THEN round((win_rate - prev_semester_win_rate) / NULLIF(stddev_win_rate_party, 0), 2)
        ELSE NULL
    END AS momentum_z_score_win_rate,
    round(win_rate * 0.35 + participation_rate * 0.25 + approval_rate * 0.25 + (100 - COALESCE(avg_rebel_rate, 0)) * 0.15, 2) AS legislative_effectiveness_index,
    CASE
        WHEN next_semester_seats IS NOT NULL
            THEN round((seat_count_proxy + next_semester_seats)::numeric / 2, 0)::integer - seat_count_proxy
        ELSE NULL
    END AS projected_seat_change,
    CASE
        WHEN prev_semester_seats IS NOT NULL AND stddev_seats_party > 0
            AND abs((seat_count_proxy - prev_semester_seats)::numeric / NULLIF(stddev_seats_party, 0)) > 2
            THEN 'RAPID_CHANGE'
        WHEN prev_semester_win_rate IS NOT NULL AND stddev_win_rate_party > 0
            AND abs((win_rate - prev_semester_win_rate) / NULLIF(stddev_win_rate_party, 0)) > 2
            THEN 'PERFORMANCE_SHIFT'
        ELSE NULL
    END AS electoral_warning_flag,
    CASE
        WHEN seat_count_proxy >= 100 THEN 'DOMINANT'
        WHEN seat_count_proxy >= 50 THEN 'MAJOR'
        WHEN seat_count_proxy >= 20 THEN 'MEDIUM'
        WHEN seat_count_proxy >= 10 THEN 'SMALL'
        ELSE 'MINOR'
    END AS party_size_classification,
    round((percentile_seats * 0.4 + percentile_win_rate * 0.4 + percentile_productivity * 0.2)::numeric, 4) AS composite_electoral_score,
    CASE
        WHEN prev_semester_seats IS NOT NULL THEN
            CASE
                WHEN seat_count_proxy > prev_semester_seats AND win_rate > COALESCE(prev_semester_win_rate, 0) THEN 'ASCENDING'
                WHEN seat_count_proxy < prev_semester_seats AND win_rate < COALESCE(prev_semester_win_rate, 0) THEN 'DESCENDING'
                WHEN seat_count_proxy > prev_semester_seats THEN 'GROWING_SEATS'
                WHEN seat_count_proxy < prev_semester_seats THEN 'LOSING_SEATS'
                WHEN win_rate > COALESCE(prev_semester_win_rate, 0) THEN 'IMPROVING_PERFORMANCE'
                WHEN win_rate < COALESCE(prev_semester_win_rate, 0) THEN 'DECLINING_PERFORMANCE'
                ELSE 'STABLE'
            END
        ELSE 'NEW_ENTRY'
    END AS electoral_trajectory,
    CASE
        WHEN quartile_by_size = 1 AND rank_by_win_rate <= 3 THEN 'POWER_BLOC'
        WHEN quartile_by_size <= 2 AND rank_by_win_rate <= 3 THEN 'INFLUENTIAL'
        WHEN quartile_by_size <= 2 THEN 'SIGNIFICANT'
        WHEN rank_by_win_rate <= 3 THEN 'EFFECTIVE_MINOR'
        ELSE 'MARGINAL'
    END AS electoral_influence_tier
FROM windowed_statistics

CREATE TEMP TABLE tmp_extraction_stats AS
WITH view_temporal_classification AS (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN matviewname IS NOT NULL THEN matviewname
            ELSE viewname
        END AS view_name,
        c.temporal_granularity
    FROM (
        SELECT viewname, $1::text AS matviewname FROM pg_views WHERE schemaname = $2
        UNION ALL
        SELECT $3::text AS viewname, matviewname FROM pg_matviews WHERE schemaname = $4
    ) v
    CROSS JOIN LATERAL cia_classify_temporal_view(COALESCE(matviewname, viewname)) AS c
),
temporal_summary AS (
    SELECT 
        temporal_granularity,
        COUNT(*) AS view_count,
        CASE temporal_granularity
            WHEN $5 THEN $6
            WHEN $7 THEN $8
            WHEN $9 THEN $10
            WHEN $11 THEN $12
            WHEN $13 THEN $14
            ELSE $15
        END AS sampling_strategy
    FROM view_temporal_classification
    GROUP BY temporal_granularity
),
overall_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        $16 AS category,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_tables WHERE schemaname = $17 AND tablename NOT LIKE $18 AND tablename NOT LIKE $19) AS total_tables,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_views WHERE schemaname = $20) AS total_views,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_matviews WHERE schemaname = $21) AS total_materialized_views,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_views WHERE schemaname = $22) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_matviews WHERE schemaname = $23) AS total_views_all,
        $24::int AS default_sample_size,
        $25::int AS party_sample_size,
        $26::int AS committee_sample_size,
        $27::int AS person_sample_size,
        $28::int AS document_sample_size,
        $29::int AS voting_sample_size,
        $30::int AS worldbank_sample_size,
        $31::int AS complete_threshold
)
SELECT 
    $32 AS metric,
    temporal_granularity AS granularity,
    view_count::bigint AS count,
    sampling_strategy AS strategy
FROM temporal_summary
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    $33 AS metric,
    $34 AS granularity,
    (total_tables + total_views_all)::bigint AS count,
    $35 || total_tables || $36 || total_views || $37 || total_materialized_views AS strategy
FROM overall_stats
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    $38 AS metric,
    $39 AS granularity,
    default_sample_size::bigint AS count,
    $40 AS strategy
FROM overall_stats
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    $41 AS metric,
    $42 AS granularity,
    party_sample_size::bigint AS count,
    $43 AS strategy
FROM overall_stats
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    $44 AS metric,
    $45 AS granularity,
    document_sample_size::bigint AS count,
    $46 AS strategy
FROM overall_stats
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    $47 AS metric,
    $48 AS granularity,
    voting_sample_size::bigint AS count,
    $49 AS strategy
FROM overall_stats
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    $50 AS metric,
    $51 AS granularity,
    worldbank_sample_size::bigint AS count,
    $52 AS strategy
FROM overall_stats
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    $53 AS metric,
    $54 AS granularity,
    complete_threshold::bigint AS count,
    $55 AS strategy
FROM overall_stats
ORDER BY metric, granularity;
